title: Howard Zinn: A People's History of the United States
original_title: Howard Zinn, une histoire populaire américaine
overview: Between 1900 and 1920 more than 14 million immigrants arrived in the US, like Howard Zinn's parents. They came fleeing poverty or war, or racism, or religious persecution. They dreamed of a promised land, of wealth, or simply of a better life.
